hero_headline: Cosy stone cottage for two in the Cotswolds countryside
about_section: Briar Cottage is a cosy stone cottage nestled in the Cotswolds countryside, located in Stow-on-the-Wold, United Kingdom. This quiet one-bedroom retreat accommodates 2 guests and features 1 bedroom and 1 bathroom. The cottage offers a warm fireplace and broadband internet, combining traditional charm with modern connectivity for a comfortable countryside escape.

amenity_descriptions.text: A traditional fireplace creates a warm and inviting atmosphere for relaxing evenings.
Broadband internet access keeps you connected throughout your stay.
